title: Machine Learning Engineering Consultant
company: Inter IKEA Group | Roman Slaap Data & AI Consultancy (self-employed)
responsibilities: Built an LLM-powered, agentic RAG platform giving IKEA employees fast access to enterprise data across stores, reducing the time to find information required to help customers.
Designed and developed a modular agent architecture to connect knowledge sources and expose them to coworkersthrough a single interface.
Partnered with business stakeholders to identify, prioritize, and integrate new and existing knowledge bases, improving accessibility and consistency of information across the platform.
Own platform and underlying server infrastructure end-to-end, including performance optimization and reliability.
